title: mandevilla bracteata
intro: Mandevilla bracteata, also known as the rock trumpet or Mandevilla, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Mandevilla bracteata can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
